ground_truth.title: Real-Time Gross Settlement Systems and Systemic Liquidity Risk
ground_truth.abstract: We model intraday liquidity dynamics in RTGS payment systems using agent-based simulation, identifying conditions under which gridlock cascades propagate across settlement participants.
